title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
